narrative: Trump-Xi summit headlines introduce geopolitical risk as markets await US CPI — USD/JPY firms to 157.15 on 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; gold lower -1.27% near $4,671; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.10%; VIX 18.1. ECB's Kocher signals no delay in hikes if energy prices persist, supporting EUR/USD at 1.1770 despite a 175bp Fed-ECB carry disadvantage. WTI crude firmed +2.39% to $97.7, providing a floor for USD/CAD at 1.3671. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27.
